examples: What is the difference between a taxidermist and a tax collector?
What is the difference between a taxidermist and a tax collector? The taxidermist takes only your skin.
Over his head was a bull's head, stuffed by a Madrid taxidermist; on the walls were framed photographs and bull-fight posters.
The striking packaging was created by a very talented taxidermist and all the animals used were road kill.
Mr. Clark brought on two extra seasonal workers to help process the trophies and is looking to hire a full-time taxidermist immediately.
